Description.PT-BR: Obtenha a Mochila para guardar e colecionar Cartas de Digimon.
Description.EN-US: Obtain the bag to start storing and collecting Digimon Cards.

Description.PT-BR: Fale com o Divermon no Cruzeiro Amarelo na Cidade Asuka
Description.EN-US: Speak with Divermon in the Yellow Cruiser located in Asuka City
